rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when bounds are concrete or visible.
Use visible feature names and declared constants in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Formulate range assumptions and guarantees using valid AGREE boolean expressions with visible identifiers.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'eq' for boolean helper declarations in AGREE: eq var : bool = expr;
Wrap AGREE annex content in proper 'annex agree {' ... '};' blocks.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level contracts.
